settings.text:
We want to give back to you and say thanks for shopping with Monster Piercing! We are delighted to indulge you in our loyalty program so that you can claim additional benefits when you continue shopping with us. 

At Monster Piercing we take our customer satisfaction and service very seriously and make sure our website allows for past and potential customers to browse through verified buyers reviews as well as allow you to get the most out of your shopping experience with us. The loyalty program consists of 3 types of rewards you can look to redeem:

For every product review you write, you can get 5 points to use for your next order. The great thing about our loyalty program is you can write reviews for all the items you’ve already purchased and receive 5 points for every verified review written. This system helps us monitor and understand our customer satisfaction rates as well as provide you with an offer you just can’t deny!

We offer points for all your orders so you can get the most of your shopping! For every £20 you spend with us, you will gain 10 points into your account! 10 points is equal to £1 off on your next order, which can be activated at checkout.

Partial points are not on offer.

You can refer a friend to our website whereby each registered account can bring in as many friends as they like to join our store! Just send them your referral link (found when you login to your account) and get your friend to make a purchase for you to activate your 10% discount too. The best thing is there's no limit to how many friends you can refer!
You can also redeem Monster Points by following our Instagram, TikTok and Facebook pages!

settings.title: Extra Information
settings.text:
• You must have an account registered with us to be eligible for the loyalty program. 
  • In order to receive points for reviews, you must be a verified buyer of the item you are reviewing. 
  • To check your points balance, just login to your store account or reach out to us and we will help you.
  • Points do not include shipping costs. 
  • Only a maximum of 50 points can be used for each purchase. If you’d like to use up more of your points, you can make more than 1 order at no extra shipping costs. Your package will be sent to you as a single shipment.
